Operation 'POST /banks/contact' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary uses unclear abbreviation 'FI' without context and vague phrasing. Description 'Expand Get Bank Contact' is cryptic and doesn't explain the operation's purpose. Improved version clarifies that this is a CREATE operation, specifies expected inputs (contact type, party type, contact details), explains the response (201 with created record), and indicates the side effect (new record creation). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Allow a FI to input data into the FI contact data base
data.summary_suggestion: Create or add bank contact information
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new bank contact record in the financial institution contact database. Accepts contact details including contact type, party type, and contact information. Returns the created contact record with a 201 status code. This operation adds new contact data and does not modify existing records.

message: Operation 'GET /banks/contact' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. This enables AI agents to determine when to call this operation and how to construct requests with appropriate parameters.

data.current_summary: Allow a FI to retrieve data from the FI contact data base
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves bank contact records from the financial institution contact database. Accepts query parameters to filter results by agent (financial institution) and contact criteria. Returns a 200 response containing matching contact records with details including contact type, party type, and contact information. Use this operation to look up specific bank contacts or retrieve contact information for a particular financial institution.
